mapper.select: SELECT id, spu_id, sku_code, title, price, stock, color, size, status, length_cm, waist_cm, leg_opening_cm, fit_type, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM product_sku WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ON' AND stock > 0 AND length_cm BETWEEN (#{lengthCm} - 2) AND (#{lengthCm} + 2) ORDER BY ABS(length_cm - #{lengthCm}) ASC, price ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT id, spu_id, sku_code, title, price, stock, color, size, status, length_cm, waist_cm, leg_opening_cm, fit_type, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM product_sku WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ON' AND stock > 0 AND length_cm BETWEEN (#{lengthCm} - 1) AND (#{lengthCm} + 1) AND waist_cm BETWEEN (#{waistCm} - 2) AND (#{waistCm} + 2) ORDER BY ABS(length_cm - #{lengthCm}) ASC, ABS(waist_cm - #{waistCm}) ASC, price ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT ps.id, ps.spu_id, ps.sku_code, ps.title, ps.price, ps.stock, ps.color, ps.size, ps.status, ps.length_cm, ps.waist_cm, ps.leg_opening_cm, ps.fit_type, ps.created_at, ps.updated_at, ps.deleted FROM product_sku ps JOIN ( SELECT oi.sku_id AS sku_id, SUM(oi.quantity) AS buy_count FROM user u JOIN order_info o ON o.user_id = u.id AND o.deleted = 0 JOIN order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id AND oi.deleted = 0 WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND ABS(u.height_cm - #{heightCm}) <= 5 AND ABS(u.waist_cm - #{waistCm}) <= 3 AND o.status IN ('PAID','SHIPPED','FINISHED') GROUP BY oi.sku_id ) t ON ps.id = t.sku_id WHERE ps.deleted = 0 AND ps.status = 'ON' AND ps.stock > 0 ORDER BY t.buy_count DESC, ps.price ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT id, spu_id, sku_code, title, price, stock, color, size, status, length_cm, waist_cm, leg_opening_cm, fit_type, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM product_sku WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ON' AND spu_id = #{spuId} ORDER BY size ASC, length_cm ASC, leg_opening_cm ASC, price ASC

SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT size ORDER BY size) AS sizes, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT color ORDER BY color) AS colors, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT length_cm ORDER BY length_cm) AS lengths, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT waist_cm ORDER BY waist_cm) AS waists, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT leg_opening_cm ORDER BY leg_opening_cm) AS legOpenings, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT fit_type ORDER BY fit_type) AS fitTypes FROM product_sku WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ON' AND spu_id = #{spuId}

SELECT id, spu_id, sku_code, title, price, stock, color, size, status, length_cm, waist_cm, leg_opening_cm, fit_type, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM product_sku WHERE deleted = 0 AND spu_id = #{spuId} ORDER BY id ASC
